text:
Update:

- Fix utmpx for FreeBSD 9+
- Seperate logwtmp.c patch from patch-gcc4
- Change MASTER_SITES because the original site has no ns record now
- Reducing portlint warnings
- Bump PORTREVISION

Added file:
- files/patch-ftpd-logwtmp.c

Modified files:
- Makefile
- pkg-plist
- files/patch-gcc4

Port maintainer (skynick@mail.sc.ru) is cc'd.
